ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* ID of the manufacturing line */,
  "product_group" TEXT /* Product group being produced (e.g., Dec. Surfaces/others, Shrink Sleeve) */,
  "net_quantity_produced" REAL /* Net quantity of products produced */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Total run time of the production process */,
  "quantity_good" REAL /* Quantity of good products produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the production took place (e.g., morning, evening, night) */,
  "machine_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the machine used for production */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Status of the production (e.g., completed, in-progress, cancelled) */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control check (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_product_group FOREIGN KEY ("product_group") REFERENCES product_groups ("product_group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_lines" (
  "line_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturing line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturing line */,
  "machine_count" INTEGER /* Number of machines in the manufacturing line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_groups" (
  "product_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product group */,
  "product_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the product group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product group */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product group (e.g., electronics, automotive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the production metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula to calculate the production metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality control metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality control metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula to calculate the quality control metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
